description: Manage Windows applications through Chocolatey. Supports install, uninstall, and list actions.

action.description: The action to perform: 'install', 'uninstall', 'list', or 'check-update'. The 'list' action lists all installed Chocolatey packages and requires no other parameters. The 'check-update' action checks for available updates for a specific application.

application.description: Name of the Chocolatey package. Required for 'install' and 'uninstall' actions, ignored for 'list'.

version.description: Optional package version to install. Only used with the 'install' action. If omitted, the latest version is installed.

check_pinned.description: Whether to include pinned packages in the check-update results. Only used with the 'check-update' action.
